sections.heading: 1. Introduction
content: This Privacy Policy explains how Adymire Agency ("we," "our," or "the Company") collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal and project-related information when you interact with our website, services, or any communication channels.
By accessing our website, submitting any form, or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.
We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner.

sections.heading: 2. Company overview
content: Adymire Agency is a software and technology services company specializing in:
sections.note: We operate primarily through our website and work with clients globally to deliver high-quality digital solutions.

sections.heading: 3. Scope of this policy
content: This Privacy Policy applies to:
bullets: Users who submit forms or inquiries
Any individual or organization that shares information with us
sections.note: This policy does not cover third-party websites, tools, or services that we may link to or integrate with. Please review their respective privacy policies.

sections.heading: 4. Information we collect
content: We collect information through various methods including website forms, email communication, project discussions, and contracts. The information is categorized as follows:

subSections.heading: 4.1 Personal information
content: When you interact with us, we may collect:
bullets: Website Link or App Link (if applicable)

subSections.heading: 4.2 Project information
content: When you submit a service request or project inquiry, we may collect:
bullets: Specific service selection (e.g., UI/UX, App Development, Marketing)

subSections.heading: 4.3 Technical information
content: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect:

subSections.heading: 4.4 Payment information
content: For project agreements and invoices:

sections.heading: 5. How we use your information
content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:

subSections.heading: 5.1 Service delivery
bullets: To provide quotes, proposals, and agreements
To deliver services such as design, development, and marketing
To communicate project updates and deliverables

subSections.heading: 5.2 Communication
bullets: To respond to your inquiries and requests
To send project-related updates via email, WhatsApp, or phone
To share important notifications about our services

subSections.heading: 5.3 Business operations
bullets: To process payments and generate invoices
To improve our services and user experience
To analyze trends and optimize our offerings

subSections.heading: 5.4 Legal and compliance
bullets: To comply with applicable laws and regulations
To enforce our Terms & Conditions and other policies
To protect our rights, property, and safety
To respond to legal requests or court orders

subSections.heading: 5.5 Marketing (optional)
content: With your consent, we may:
bullets: Send newsletters, updates, or promotional offers
Share case studies or success stories (with your approval)
Include your testimonial or feedback in marketing materials
subSections.note: You can opt out of marketing communications at any time by contacting us.

sections.heading: 6. How we protect your information
content: We take data security seriously and implement industry-standard measures to protect your information:
bullets: Secure servers and encrypted data storage
Confidential handling of sensitive project information
Limited access to authorized personnel only
sections.note: However, please note that no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 7. Data retention
content: We retain your information for as long as necessary to:
bullets: Fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy
Comply with legal, accounting, or reporting requirements
sections.note: Once your information is no longer needed, we will securely delete or anonymize it unless required by law to retain it longer.

sections.heading: 8. Sharing your information
content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information in the following circumstances:

subSections.heading: 8.1 Service providers
content: We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in:
• Hosting and maintaining our website
• Payment processing
• Email and communication tools
• Project management and collaboration platforms
• Analytics and performance tracking
These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the purposes we specify.

subSections.heading: 8.2 Legal requirements
content: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to:
• Court orders or legal processes
• Government or regulatory requests
• Protection of our rights, property, or safety
• Prevention of fraud or illegal activities

subSections.heading: 8.3 Business transfers
content: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred to the new entity. We will notify you of any such change and provide you with options regarding your information.

sections.heading: 9. Your rights and choices
content: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:

subSections.heading: 9.1 Access and correction
content: You can request access to the information we hold about you and ask us to correct any inaccuracies.

subSections.heading: 9.2 Deletion
content: You can request that we delete your information, subject to legal or contractual obligations that require us to retain it.

subSections.heading: 9.3 Opt-out
content: You can opt out of marketing communications by contacting us or using the unsubscribe link in our emails.

subSections.heading: 9.4 Data portability
content: You can request a copy of your information in a commonly used format.
To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details provided at the end of this policy.

sections.heading: 10. Cookies and tracking technologies
content: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
• Enhance user experience
• Analyze website traffic and usage patterns
• Remember your preferences and settings
• Deliver personalized content and advertisements
You can control cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

sections.heading: 11. Third-party links and services
content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, tools, or platforms. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites.
We encourage you to review their privacy policies before sharing any information with them.

sections.heading: 12. Children's privacy
content: Our services are not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected information from a child, we will take steps to delete it.

sections.heading: 13. International data transfers
content: If you are located outside of India, please be aware that your information may be transferred to and processed in India or other countries where we operate.
By using our services, you consent to the transfer of your information to jurisdictions that may have different data protection laws.

sections.heading: 14. Changes to this privacy policy
content: We reserve the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website.
We will notify you of significant changes via email or a prominent notice on our website. Your continued use of our services after changes are made constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 15. Contact information
content: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or how we handle your information, please contact us:
Adymire Agency
Email: [Your Official Email]
Phone: [Your Official Phone Number]
Website: [Your Website URL]
Address: [Your Registered Business Address]

sections.heading: 16. Acceptance of this policy
content: By using our website, submitting forms, or engaging our services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Privacy Policy.
If you do not agree with any part of this policy, please do not use our services or share your information with us.
